# Kit for AI

> Persistent memory for AI agents: remember/recall over auto-managed knowledge
> bases, hybrid RAG search with cited chat, and document→Markdown/JSON
> conversion — over MCP and REST with one API key.

## Setup

- [Agent setup instructions](https://kitforai.com/llm-setup): point your agent here to self-configure
- MCP endpoint: https://kitforai.com/api/mcp (header `x-api-key: kfa_…`)
- REST base: https://kitforai.com/api/v1

## Docs

- [Documentation](https://kitforai.com/docs)
- [API reference](https://kitforai.com/reference)
- [Blog](https://kitforai.com/blog)
- [Pricing](https://kitforai.com/#pricing)
